home.title: HomePot — Shared Expenses Made Simple
home.description: HomePot makes shared expenses effortless. Track, split, and settle expenses with your group. Free for iOS.

hero.headline: Stop fighting about money.
hero.subtitle: Track, split, and settle shared expenses in seconds. Built for couples, roommates, and families who want peace.
hero.promo_hint: Sign up below and get 1 month of Pro for free when we launch.

f5.title: See where your money goes

pricing.title: Simple, honest pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start for free, upgrade when you need more.
pricing.pro_desc: For power users who want the full experience.

items.a: Yes. Your data is encrypted in transit and at rest on AWS servers. We comply with GDPR, CCPA, and LGPD. No ads, no tracking, no data selling. Ever.

items.q: How does the AI receipt scanner work?
items.a: Take a photo of any receipt. Our AI extracts the total, each line item, discounts, taxes, merchant name, and even the currency — automatically. You review and confirm.

items.q: Can I use it for trips with friends?
items.a: Yes. Use "Expense Split" mode for trips — each person pays with their own money, and HomePot calculates who owes whom at the end, minimizing the number of transfers.
Free plan: 1 group, 20 expenses/month, 10 AI scans/month, multi-currency, no ads. Pro: unlimited everything from €2.92/month (annual). That's 15x less than a coffee per day.

splitwise.title: HomePot vs Splitwise — honest comparison (2026)
splitwise.description: Tired of Splitwise daily limits and ads? HomePot has AI receipt scanning, 14 currencies, zero ads for €2.92/mo. Full comparison, pricing, features.
splitwise.h1: HomePot vs Splitwise — the honest comparison
splitwise.intro: Splitwise made expense splitting mainstream. But free users now hit a 3-expense daily cap and see ads with cooldown timers between screens. If that's driving you crazy, here's how HomePot compares on every feature that matters.
splitwise.table_subtitle: Price, limits, features, privacy — everything on one page.

differentiators.title: AI reads every line
differentiators.desc: Our scanner extracts each item, tax, discount, and tip — not just the total. Perfect for splitting a restaurant bill where not everyone ordered the same.

differentiators.title: Automatic currency detection
differentiators.desc: Scan a receipt in Bangkok, see it converted to euros instantly using today's rate. 14 currencies supported, no manual selection needed.

differentiators.title: Zero ads, zero trackers
differentiators.desc: We make money from subscriptions, not your attention or data. No interstitial ads, no cooldown timers, no analytics SDKs. Ever.

differentiators.title: Fixed vs variable splitting
differentiators.desc: Rent splits evenly. Dinner splits by who was there. HomePot handles both models in the same group without hacks or workarounds.

differentiators.title: Minimum-transfer settlement
differentiators.desc: At month end, HomePot calculates the fewest transfers needed to zero out balances. No more chains of payments — just one or two clean settlements.

differentiators.title: Real privacy, documented
differentiators.desc: Open GDPR-compliant policy, data hosted in the EU, full account deletion in one tap. Nothing hidden in fine print.

splitwise.pain_subtitle: Common frustrations that brought people here.
pain_points: The 3-expense daily limit is a joke on a trip. I hit it by day two.
Ads with cooldown timers between screens made me feel like I was being punished for not paying.
Receipt scanning reads the total but not the items — useless when we split a restaurant bill line by line.
I wanted multi-currency support without manually picking the currency every single time.
Splitwise got slower and clunkier over the years. I just want something simple that respects my time.

faq.q: Can I import my Splitwise data into HomePot?
faq.a: CSV import is on the roadmap. For now, you can export your Splitwise group as CSV and we'll add an importer soon. Contact us at homepotapp@gmail.com and we'll notify you the day it ships.

Yes. The free plan includes 1 group, 20 expenses per month, 10 AI receipt scans, multi-currency, and zero ads — forever. Pro (from €2.92/mo annual) removes limits and adds unlimited groups, exports, and advanced analytics.

faq.q: How does HomePot make money if there are no ads?
faq.a: Subscriptions. Pro costs €2.92/mo on annual billing — less than a coffee per month. That's the only revenue model. No ads, no data selling, no affiliate deals inside the app.
Yes. Add expenses offline; they sync automatically when you reconnect. Settlement calculations run on-device, so you can see balances without a connection.
14 currencies with automatic detection from receipts: EUR, USD, GBP, CHF, CAD, AUD, NZD, JPY, SEK, KRW, PLN, BRL, MXN, CNY. Exchange rates update daily.
Yes. We comply with GDPR (EU), CCPA (California), and LGPD (Brazil). Data is hosted on AWS EU, encrypted at rest and in transit. Full account and data deletion in one tap from Settings.
